q: Do you look out the window at the scenery when travelling by bus or car?
examiner_note: Đây là câu hỏi về thói quen cá nhân trong quá trình di chuyển. Bạn có thể nói về việc ngắm cảnh giúp giảm bớt sự nhàm chán (boredom) hoặc say xe (motion sickness). Hãy sử dụng các cụm từ như 'watching the world go by', 'fleeting glimpses', 'contemplative' để làm phong phú câu trả lời. Ngoài ra, việc so sánh giữa việc ngắm cảnh và thói quen dùng điện thoại cũng là một hướng trả lời hay.

band7.text: Yes, I almost always look out the window. I find it very relaxing to watch the different landscapes pass by, especially if the journey is long. It’s much better than just staring at my phone the whole time.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, rõ ràng. Có sự so sánh nhẹ với việc dùng điện thoại. Sử dụng từ vựng ổn (relaxing, landscapes pass by).

band8.text: Absolutely, I’m quite fond of 'watching the world go by' during a commute. Whether it’s the bustling city streets or the tranquil countryside, there’s always something interesting to observe. I find that it puts me in a contemplative mood and helps the time pass much more quickly.
band8.note: Sử dụng các cụm từ tự nhiên và hình ảnh (watching the world go by, bustling city streets, tranquil countryside, contemplative mood). Diễn đạt trôi chảy.

band9.text: Without fail, I find myself captivated by the shifting panoramas outside the window. There’s something uniquely hypnotic about the rhythmic motion of travel combined with the fleeting glimpses of life and nature unfolding. For me, it’s a form of passive meditation that allows my mind to wander and escape the monotony of a long journey. It’s certainly more enriching than being tethered to a digital screen.
band9.note: Từ vựng cực kỳ tinh tế và giàu sức gợi (captivated, shifting panoramas, hypnotic, fleeing glimpses, unfolding, passive meditation, monotony, tethered). Cách lập luận mang tính phản tư sâu sắc.

v.meaning: ngắm nhìn thế giới trôi qua (ngắm cảnh vật/người)
v.example: I can spend hours in a cafe, just watching the world go by.
The quiet rainy afternoon put me in a contemplative mood.

v.meaning: toàn cảnh luôn thay đổi (khi di chuyển)
v.example: From the train window, we enjoyed the shifting panorama of the mountains.

v.meaning: có tính thôi miên/gây mê hoặc
v.example: The sound of the rain was almost hypnotic.
I caught a fleeting glimpse of a deer in the woods.

v.meaning: thiền thụ động (thư giãn tâm trí một cách tự nhiên)
v.example: Watching the sea can be a form of passive meditation.

v.meaning: sự đơn điệu/nhàm chán lặp đi lặp lại
v.example: She needed a vacation to break the monotony of her daily routine.
In the modern office, people are tethered to their desks all day.

v.meaning: quãng đường đi học/đi làm hàng ngày
v.example: My daily commute takes about forty-five minutes by train.
Looking out at the horizon can help reduce motion sickness.
The mountain scenery was absolutely breathtaking.
Everyone’s eyes were glued to the screen during the final match.
I like to gaze out of the window and daydream.
The volcanic landscape of Iceland is very unique.
The photographer specializes in capturing urban scenery at night.
The train passed through a beautiful rural landscape.
The vibrant streets of the city were full of life.
We spent our holiday in the serene countryside.
The noise of passing traffic kept me awake.
I always request a window seat when booking a flight.
The bus was full of exhausted passengers.
I was daydreaming and missed my stop.

v.meaning: chuyến du lịch bằng đường bộ
v.example: We’re planning a long road trip across the country this summer.
There isn’t much time for sightseeing on this business trip.
He sat there staring into space, lost in thought.
A beautiful view started to unfold as we reached the top.
Artists often observe the world in great detail.
The noise from the street is a constant distraction.
The forest had an enchanting atmosphere in the moonlight.

v.meaning: mê hoặc/quá đẹp đến mức không thể rời mắt
v.example: The rhythmic motion of the waves mesmerized her.
The sunset over the ocean was breathtaking.

v.meaning: trong vắt một cách ấn tượng
v.example: The air in the mountains was stunningly clear.
The fireworks display was truly spectacular.
She told an intriguing story about her travels.
The house was surrounded by rolling green hills.
The rugged mountains were difficult to climb.
The restaurant offers a panoramic view of the harbor.
The expansive desert stretched out before them.
The vastness of the ocean is hard to imagine.
They live in a remote village in the mountains.
The old town is very picturesque with its narrow alleys.
The garden is a tranquil place to sit and read.
The placid surface of the lake reflected the mountains.
The bustling city center is full of tourists.
I have very vivid memories of that holiday.
The far-off mountains were indistinct in the mist.

v.meaning: sự mờ nhạt (do chuyển động nhanh)
v.example: The scenery became a blur as the train sped up.
Photography is all about capturing the moment.
Traveling provides a rich sensory experience.
Stargazing always fills me with a sense of wonder.
